http://purl.org/dc/terms/description.@value: This ontology defines concepts and properties related to the end-of-life phase of products in a Digital Product Passport (DPP), including reuse, recycling, recovery processes, and material separation.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.@value: Digital Product Passport – End-of-Life Management Module Ontology

A set of strategies and practices for managing a Product at the end of its useful life, encompassing various disposal options such as reuse, recycling, remanufacturing, and repurposing.
This is an entity positioning annotation generated by CoModIDE (https://comodide.com/). Removing this annotation will break rendering the CoModIDE schema diagram view.
In the EoL context, this could represent different roles involved in the EoL process, such as the recycler, refurbisher, or consumer.
